title: Pulse Code II — Signal Drift
tagline: Five seeded signals. Pick your track, hold the line.
blurb: The Pulse Code core, expanded: five distinct generated tracks, three difficulties, hold notes, layered synths, and per-track letter-grade high scores.
whatsNew: Song-select screen with five distinct seeded tracks (tempo/key/mood)
Easy / Normal / Hard difficulties change note density and fall speed
Layered synth voices: drums + bass + lead + per-mood arp & pads
Per-track, per-difficulty high scores with S-D letter grades
Accuracy breakdown (Perfect / Good / Miss / Holds) on results
